task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template in JSON format and extract all resource logical IDs
solution_criteria: The JSON parser should read a CloudFormation template and return an array of all logical IDs from the Resources section

task: Write a Python function to validate AWS S3 bucket names according to AWS naming rules
solution_criteria: The function should accept a string and return True if it follows S3 bucket naming conventions (3-63 characters, lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens, starts and ends with letter/number), False otherwise

task: Create a regex pattern to match valid AWS IAM role ARNs
solution_criteria: The regex should match ARNs in the format arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name and capture the account ID and role name separately

task: Write a Python function to convert AWS EC2 instance types to their vCPU and memory specifications
solution_criteria: The function should take an instance type string like 't3.medium' and return a dictionary with vCPU count and memory in GB

task: Create a JSON schema that validates AWS Lambda function configuration objects
solution_criteria: The JSON schema should enforce required fields like FunctionName, Runtime, Handler, and Role, with appropriate type constraints

task: Write a regex pattern to extract AWS access key IDs from log files
solution_criteria: The regex should match and capture AWS access key IDs which follow the pattern AKIA followed by 16 alphanumeric characters

task: Write a Python function to parse AWS CloudWatch log timestamps and convert them to a human-readable format
solution_criteria: The function should accept a Unix timestamp in milliseconds and return a formatted datetime string

task: Create a regex pattern to validate AWS RDS database endpoint URLs
solution_criteria: The regex should match RDS endpoints in the format identifier.region.rds.amazonaws.com and extract the identifier and region

task: Write a Python function to calculate AWS S3 storage costs based on storage class and GB stored
solution_criteria: The function should accept storage class name and GB amount, then return the estimated monthly cost using current AWS pricing tiers

task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store entry with encryption and tagging
solution_criteria: The JSON object should include Name, Value, Type, KmsKeyId, and Tags fields with appropriate values for a secure parameter
